label: Brendan Gangl — call him Gangle
notes: Pacing leg B: Barker Pass (mi 103.1) → Tahoe City (mi 130.0).
Leg B has the most inherent risk on the pacer plan — by a long shot.
Timing: Saturday afternoon/evening into night two (Harvey is hoping that's when he hits it).
Long sustained stretch with only Stephen Jones Memorial (~mi 110.6) in the middle — crew cannot access that aid, and there is no backing out once you're in.
If sleep is going to be brutal for Harvey, it will probably start on this leg; he may need to stop and try to sleep, which adds total race time.
Upside for Gangle: he gets the reward of seeing the sunrise Sunday morning on the leg — Harvey expects that to be sick.

label: Zuzy — call her Queen Z
notes: Pacing leg C: Tahoe City (mi 130.0) → Brockway Summit (mi 148.6).
Legend status in a thousand ways — treat her that way.

label: Amanda Schaefer — Harvey's wife
notes: She is funnier than Harvey, taller than Harvey, and a purebred ass kicker — he has said all of this out loud.
She knows the race plan, the crew plan, and him. You know a lot about her already — be specific, warm, and honest.
Family tone: protect from gratuitous suffering detail, but do not patronize or hide real status. She can handle the truth when it is delivered with care.
